title: miRNA extraction from fecal matter
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1b7dj","text":"This is a modification to the Qiagen proticol for miRNA extraction for tissues ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: In a 1.5ml tube, homogenize _________mg of dry fecal matter in 700ul of QIAzol
Add 140ul of chloroform, MIX WELL and let incubate for 1 min at 20C, MIX AGAIN, and incubate for 3 min
Recover flow through , and add 0.65x volumes for 100% Et-OH
Transfer aqueous phase and determine volume by pipetting, combine with 1x Volume of 70% Et-OH .
Run through a "RNeasy Mini spin Column" at >8,000xg at 20C
Run through a "RNeasy Mini spin Column" at >8,000xg at 20C, 700ul at a time discarding flow-through
Wash matrix with 500 ul of RPE
Wash matrix ______x with ice cold 90% Et-OH
Dry Tube by spinning column for 5 min
______num samples \cdot 0.55 \cdot 0.9 = _____________ml 100% Et-OH ______num samples \cdot 0.55 \cdot 0.1 = _____________ml Molecular Grade Water
______num samples \cdot 0.55 \cdot 0.7 = _____________ml 100% Et-OH ______num samples \cdot 0.55 \cdot 0.3 = _____________ml Molecular Grade Water
